---
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: gsudiss
    classoption: [12pt, gsu, online, openany, singleside, hidelinks]
    pdf-engine: pdflatex
    keep-tex: true
    top-level-division: chapter
    number-sections: true
    toc: false
    cite-method: natbib
    biblio-style: apalike
    include-in-header: _tex/preamble.tex
    include-before-body: _tex/frontmatter.tex
bibliography:
  - pl.bib
  - delhi.bib
  - ktc.bib
execute:
  eval: true
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

{{< include chapters/01-hawaii.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/02-india.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/03-mandates.qmd >}}
